subcodes.first_line: O Abu'l-Qásim! We make mention of thee in the Prison, and give thee glad tidings of the bounty of God, the Lord of all worlds, and counsel thee with that which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اباالقاسم انا نذکرک فی السجن و نبشرک بعنایه الله رب العالمین و نوصیک بما
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
